result:
Build is green.

## Report

**Modified:** `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs` — overrode the `require_lib` method in the `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block (lines 291–295). Reverted the trait's default body, since default-method bodies see `self: &mut Self` (not `&mut LuaState`), which fails to coerce into `&mut LuaState` for the helper call.

**Behavior:** `require_lib(name, openf, glb)` now delegates to the existing Phase-A free function `crate::auxlib::requiref(self, name, openf, glb)`, which faithfully ports `luaL_requiref` from `lauxlib.c:983`: fetch `LOADED` subtable from the registry, look up `LOADED[name]`; if falsy, call `openf(name)` and store the result; remove the LOADED table; if `glb`, also assign to `_G[name]`.

**Next todo!() likely to surface (called transitively via `auxlib::requiref`):** `get_subtable` → `state.get_subtable_registry`, `get_field`, `to_boolean`, `pop_n`, `push_c_function`, `push_bytes`, `call`, `push_value`, `set_field`, `remove`, `set_global`. The implement loop will catch the next one.

**`cargo build -p lua-cli`:** green (warnings only).
